title: Ends With Suffix
description: Write a Vera function that checks if the first string ends with the second string as a suffix. Use the string_ends_with built-in function. The first parameter is the haystack, the second is the suffix.
description_neutral: Check if the first string ends with the second string as a suffix.
notes: Tests discovery of string_ends_with. The slot ordering is: @String.0=suffix (nearest/rightmost), @String.1=haystack. But string_ends_with takes (haystack, suffix), so the call must be string_ends_with(@String.1, @String.0).
